scripts.build:github: cross-env VITEPRESS_BASE=/introduction-to-zos-commands-and-panels-zh-tw/ VITE_MEDIA_BASE_URL=https://nicholas-yahung-chien.github.io/introduction-to-zos-commands-and-panels-media vitepress build docs && node scripts/prune-dist-media.mjs
scripts.build:cloudflare: cross-env VITEPRESS_BASE=/ VITE_MEDIA_BASE_URL=https://nicholas-yahung-chien.github.io/introduction-to-zos-commands-and-panels-media vitepress build docs && node scripts/prune-dist-media.mjs
scripts.verify:release: npm run build:github && npm run build:cloudflare && npm run site:check && npm run subtitles:check && npm run content:quality && npm run practice:check && npm run course:inventory:check
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build:cloudflare && npx wrangler pages deploy docs/.vitepress/dist --project-name introduction-to-zos-commands-and-panels-zh-tw --branch main
